name: log-all-tools
description: Log all tool usage to a file

name: block-dangerous-bash
description: Block dangerous Bash commands (rm, sudo, etc.)

config.command: echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Dangerous command blocked by security policy"}'

comment: Disabled by default - enable for production use

name: notify-on-error
description: Send notification when tool execution fails
comment: Disabled by default - enable for production monitoring

config.command: echo '[Session End] Thank you for using zrb!'
